reason: Auto-apply pending PG migrations when database client is first initialized
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
index c4d3389f5..8fcc13938 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ import path from "path"
 import { Flag } from "@opencode-ai/core/flag/flag"
 import { InstallationChannel } from "@opencode-ai/core/installation/version"
 import { EffectBridge } from "@/effect/bridge"
-import { init } from "#db"
+import { init, applyMigrations } from "#db"
 import { Effect, Schema } from "effect"
 
 export const NotFoundError = NamedError.create("NotFoundError", {
@@ -53,6 +53,9 @@ export const Client = Object.assign(
 
     const db = init(dbPath)
 
+    // Apply pending PG migrations on startup (fire-and-forget for PGlite speed)
+    applyMigrations(db).catch((err) => log.error("migration failed", { error: String(err) }))
+

reason: Run all pg test files, not just adapter.pg.test.ts
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/package.json b/packages/opencode/package.json
index 219bd31a1..3612ec85d 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/package.json
+++ b/packages/opencode/package.json
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
     "typecheck": "tsgo --noEmit",
     "test": "bun test --timeout 30000",
     "test:ci": "mkdir -p .artifacts/unit && bun test --timeout 30000 --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=.artifacts/unit/junit.xml",
-    "test:pg": "mkdir -p .artifacts/unit && bun test --timeout 30000 --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=.artifacts/unit/junit-pg.xml test/storage/adapter.pg.test.ts",
+    "test:pg": "mkdir -p .artifacts/unit && bun test --timeout 30000 --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=.artifacts/unit/junit-pg.xml test/storage/*.pg.test.ts",
     "test:httpapi": "bun run script/httpapi-exercise.ts --mode coverage --fail-on-missing --fail-on-skip && bun run script/httpapi-exercise.ts --mode auth --fail-on-missing --fail-on-skip && bun run script/httpapi-exercise.ts --mode effect --fail-on-missin

reason: Add Postgres service container CI job with pg-test runner
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/test.yml b/.github/workflows/test.yml
index 4a65b9927..2e8f6ccd3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/test.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/test.yml
@@ -164,3 +164,71 @@ jobs:
             packages/app/e2e/junit-*.xml
             packages/app/e2e/test-results
             packages/app/e2e/playwright-report
+
+  pg-test:
+    name: pg-test (${{ matrix.settings.name }})
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        settings:
+          - name: linux
+            host: blacksmith-4vcpu-ubuntu-2404
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.settings.host }}
+    services:
+      postgres:
